_comment: Per-client design tokens consumed by theme/aqm-base/tailwind.config.cjs at build time (loadTokens reads colors / fontFamily|fonts / maxWidth). Place at content/design.json before running `npm run css`. Seeded from the live AQ Marketing styles.css :root — brand scale = dark band (#06080b / #0d1014), accent scale = brand RED #c8102e (the legacy --teal/--red token, VALUE is red), plus a named ORANGE scale (#f26b3a, legacy --orange). Fonts = Inter only (the live site loads Inter 400-800; Georgia is decorative-only and not tokenized).
